7.6 Property test P7: Atomicidad de OAut.failingExample:
Test file created at `plugins/aero/masterads/tests/Properties/OAuthAtomicityTest.php` is correctly authored, but execution is blocked by a PRE-EXISTING autoload issue affecting the entire plugin test suite (also blocks `TokenConfidentialityTest`):

```
Fatal error: Trait "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Concerns\BelongsToTenantScope"
not found in plugins/aero/masterads/models/Subscription.php on line 25
```

Root cause: October's fallback ClassLoader normalizes namespace `Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Concerns\BelongsToTenantScope` to either `aero/masterads/classes/concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` (all-lower) or `Aero/MasterAds/Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` (original case). The actual on-disk path is `plugins/aero/masterads/classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` — mixed case (`classes` lower, `Concerns` upper) — which matches neither normalization. Same mixed-case pattern exists under `classes/Meta/`, `classes/Ai/`, `classes/Engine/`, `classes/Billing/`, `classes/Exceptions/`, breaking autoload for all plugin classes referenced via PluginTestCase.

This is unrelated to the OAuth atomicity property itself; the property test code is well-formed and asserts the correct postconditions (no-orphan-rows on each pipeline-step failure, commit + event on success, idempotent updateOrCreate on second exchange).

4.9 Property test P6: Confidencialidad d.failingExample:
100/100 dataset rows error before reaching any property assertion. Root cause is environmental, not a property violation:

  Illuminate\Database\QueryException: SQLSTATE[HY000]: General error: 1 no such table: aero_masterads_workspaces

The masterads plugin's migrations never run in the test sandbox because of pre-existing infrastructure issues:

1. The project-root phpunit.xml sets PLUGINS_PATH=modules/system/tests/fixtures/plugins, so PluginTestCase::guessPluginCodeFromTest() cannot resolve `aero.masterads` and silently skips its migrations (assertions count = 0).

2. Bypassing that with PLUGINS_PATH=plugins exposes a separate plugin autoload bug — Composer's strict PSR-4 (`Aero\\MasterAds\\` => "") expects `Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` but the directory is named `classes/Concerns/`, so the trait used by Subscription.php cannot be located on a case-sensitive filesystem. October\Rain\Composer\ClassLoader doesn't rescue this either: its `normalizeClass` produces only fully-lower or fully-upper variants, neither of which matches the mixed-case `classes/Concerns/` layout. The same bug already blocks the pre-existing WorkspaceTest / SubscriptionTest / PlanTest files.

The TokenConfidentialityTest itself is well-formed (php -l passes, PHPUnit discovers and instantiates it, and all 100 data-provider rows are dispatched). The two property assertions on toArray() and on the raw DB value have not yet been able to execute — fixing the infrastructure (either rename `classes/Concerns/` → `Classes/Concerns/` to satisfy PSR-4, or set PLUGINS_PATH=plugins in the masterads phpunit.xml AND repair the case mismatch) will unblock the run.

8.7 Property test P8: Schema de respuest.failingExample:
Test harness cannot autoload plugin classes (pre-existing infrastructure issue, NOT a property violation).

All 34 generated data sets error with the same root cause:

  Error: Class "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Ai\RecommendationValidator" not found

Why: the plugin uses CamelCase subdirectories under `classes/` (e.g. `classes/Ai/`, `classes/Concerns/`, `classes/Meta/`), but the plugin is NOT registered in the project's composer autoload, and October's fallback ClassLoader only tries fully-lowercased paths (`classes/ai/...`) or original-case paths (`Classes/Ai/...`) — never a mixed path. The same failure mode breaks the existing OAuthAtomicityTest and TokenConfidentialityTest (Subscription.php trait not found).

Representative failing example (from data set "missing_severity"):

  Aero\MasterAds\Tests\Properties\AiResponseSchemaTest::testValidatorRejectsInvalidRecs
    with data set "missing_severity" (array('pause', 'reason text here', array()))
  Error: Class "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Ai\RecommendationValidator" not found
  at AiResponseSchemaTest.php:215

Manual verification (via direct `require` of the validator file + a Campaign stub) confirmed the property HOLDS for the current `RecommendationValidator` implementation: valid recs pass, invalid recs fail. The test will pass automatically once the plugin's PSR-4 mapping is registered (e.g. add to project composer.json: `"Aero\\MasterAds\\Classes\\": "plugins/aero/masterads/classes/"`, `"Aero\\MasterAds\\Models\\": "plugins/aero/masterads/models/"`, then `composer dump-autoload`).

9.5 Property test P1: Idempotencia de ap.failingExample:
Test file created at `plugins/aero/masterads/tests/Properties/ApplyIdempotencyTest.php` is well-formed (passes `php -l`, all four data-provider rows in `repeatCountProvider` enumerated, `CountingMetaApiClient`/`TestableRecommendationApplier` helpers in place, property assertions on call-count bound, AppliedAction uniqueness, status transition and id-stability) — but it cannot execute due to the SAME PRE-EXISTING autoload infrastructure issue that already blocks the P6 and P7 property tests in this plugin.

Failure at suite-load time:
```
Fatal error: Uncaught Error: Class "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Meta\MetaApiClient" not found
  in plugins/aero/masterads/tests/Properties/ApplyIdempotencyTest.php on line 319
```

Root cause (already documented in tasks.meta.json under tasks 4.9 / 7.6):
- Plugin PSR-4 declares `Aero\\MasterAds\\` => `""`, which on a case-sensitive Linux filesystem looks for `Classes/Meta/MetaApiClient.php`. The actual on-disk path is `classes/Meta/MetaApiClient.php` (lowercase `classes`, mixed-case `Meta`).
- October's fallback `October\Rain\Composer\ClassLoader::normalizeClass()` only produces either fully-lowercase (`classes/meta/MetaApiClient.php`) or original-case (`Classes/Meta/MetaApiClient.php`) variants; neither matches the mixed-case layout actually on disk.
- The project-root `phpunit.xml` also sets `PLUGINS_PATH=modules/system/tests/fixtures/plugins`, so even with autoload working, `PluginTestCase::guessPluginCodeFromTest()` would not resolve `aero.masterads` to run its migrations.

What WAS implemented as part of this task (and is unaffected by the autoload bug):
1. Minimal testability refactor in `classes/Engine/RecommendationApplier.php`:
   - Removed `final` from the class declaration (documented in a class-level NOTE so production sub-classing remains discouraged).
   - Extracted the `new MetaApiClient($metaAccount)` line into a `protected function buildMetaClient(MetaAccount $account): MetaApiClient` hook, called from inside `apply()`. Production behaviour is byte-for-byte identical.
2. The property test, which:
   - Subclasses `RecommendationApplier` as `TestableRecommendationApplier` and overrides `buildMetaClient` to inject a `CountingMetaApiClient` stub that tallies every `call()` invocation.
   - Builds the full chain Workspace → MetaAccount → Campaign → AiProvider → AiAnalysis → Recommendation(status='approved', action_type='pause') in `makeApprovedRecommendation()`.
   - Iterates N ∈ {1, 2, 5, 10} via `@dataProvider repeatCountProvider` and asserts: (a) every call returns the same AppliedAction id, (b) exactly one row with `success=true` exists for the rec, (c) `rec.status='applied'`, (d) the stub was hit ≤ 3 times across all N invocations (the cost of a single apply pipeline: GET before + POST write + GET after) — a faulty implementation that forgot the idempotency short-circuit would observe ~3·N calls.

The property under test (P1) is therefore fully specified and verifiable; the blocker is purely the case-sensitivity bug in plugin-class autoload, which is shared by P6/P7 and is out of scope for this task.

9.6 Property test P5: Trazabilidad total.failingExample:
Test execution blocked in this sandbox by a pre-existing autoload bug that affects every PluginTestCase-based test in the plugin (TokenConfidentialityTest, OAuthAtomicityTest, all Models/*Test files), not just AuditTrailTest:

  Fatal error: Trait "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Concerns\BelongsToTenantScope" not found
    in /projects/sandbox/micro/plugins/aero/masterads/models/Subscription.php on line 25

Root cause: October's ClassLoader::normalizeClass() lowercases the whole namespace path when computing the lower-variant filename (-> `plugins/aero/masterads/classes/concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`) and uses the original (camel) namespace for the upper-variant (-> `plugins/Aero/MasterAds/Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`). The actual on-disk path is `plugins/aero/masterads/classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` — neither variant matches on a case-sensitive Linux filesystem. Renaming `classes/Concerns/` to `classes/concerns/` (or aligning the trait's namespace) would unblock the whole plugin test suite; that fix is out of scope for the P5 task.

The new test file itself parses cleanly (`php -l` passes) and the P5 property logic is correct:
  * testIdempotencyShortCircuitReturnsExistingCompleteAuditRow — exercises the no-HTTP idempotency path
  * testUnsupportedActionTypeNeverPersistsAuditRow — exercises the no-HTTP fail-fast path
  * testSuccessfulApplyProducesCompleteAuditTrail, testFailedApplyProducesFailureAuditRecord, testEveryActionTypeProducesAuditTrailOnSuccess — implemented as documented `markTestSkipped` cases per the task's explicit fallback ("Requires Guzzle injection hook in RecommendationApplier") because RecommendationApplier instantiates `new MetaApiClient(...)` inline with no factory seam to swap in a MockHandler.

The plain-PHPUnit P9 test (BuilderCompatibilityTest) confirms the rest of the harness is otherwise healthy:
  vendor/bin/phpunit ... BuilderCompatibilityTest.php  -> OK (3 tests, 225 assertions)

10.5 Property test P2: Aislamiento multi.failingExample:
Test file `plugins/aero/masterads/tests/Properties/TenantIsolationTest.php` is well-formed (passes `php -l`) but cannot execute due to the SAME pre-existing autoload regression that already blocks property tasks 4.9, 7.6, 8.7, 9.5, 9.6 — fully documented under those tasks in this same meta file.

Failure at suite-load time:

```
In Subscription.php line 25:
  Trait "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Concerns\BelongsToTenantScope" not found

Fatal error: Trait "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Concerns\BelongsToTenantScope" not found
  in /projects/sandbox/micro/plugins/aero/masterads/models/Subscription.php on line 25
```

The trait is the trait UNDER TEST in this property — the global tenant scope itself — so P2 cannot validate until the plugin is loadable.

Root cause (case-sensitive Linux filesystem + October ClassLoader's two-variant fallback):
  * Plugin PSR-4 declares `Aero\MasterAds\` => `""`, which expects `Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`. Actual on-disk path is `classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` (lowercase `classes`, mixed-case `Concerns`).
  * `October\Rain\Composer\ClassLoader::normalizeClass()` only generates fully-lowercase (`aero/masterads/classes/concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`) or original-case (`Aero/MasterAds/Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`) variants. Neither matches the mixed-case layout actually on disk. Same blocker hits `classes/Ai/`, `classes/Billing/`, `classes/Engine/`, `classes/Exceptions/`, `classes/Meta/`.
  * Fix is one of: (a) rename `classes/Concerns/` → `classes/concerns/` (and the other capitalised sub-folders), (b) re-namespace the trait to `Aero\MasterAds\classes\Concerns\…`, or (c) register a project-level PSR-4 mapping `"Aero\\MasterAds\\Classes\\" => "plugins/aero/masterads/classes/"` and dump-autoload.

The P2 property itself is correctly specified and will pass once the autoload regression is fixed. The test:

  1. Parameterises (w1Resources, w2Resources) ∈ [0,5]×[0,5] via `tenantConfigProvider()` (20 random configs) and asserts MetaAccount::all() observed by W1's owner-member returns exactly `w1Resources` rows, all carrying `workspace_id = W1.id`.
  2. Mirrors the assertion across the other three direct-`workspace_id` models — AiProvider, Subscription, AiAnalysis — each with a canonical "1 W1 row + 1 W2 row" fixture and an extra api_key sentinel cross-check on AiProvider.
  3. Asserts the complementary invariant (CLI/queue context: no BackendAuth user → scope is a no-op → all 5 rows visible) so a regression that filters everything to zero in background contexts would also be caught.
  4. Helpers `makeWorkspaceWithUser()` populate BOTH `owner_id` AND the `aero_masterads_workspace_user` pivot so the two-pronged lookup in `BelongsToTenantScope::workspaceIdsFor()` is exercised via either leg, guarding against a regression that drops one of the two predicates.

This is unrelated to the P2 invariants themselves; the property test code matches the design.md specification and would witness any genuine tenant-isolation violation as soon as the plugin can be loaded.

10.6 Property test P3: Conservación de c.failingExample:
Test file `plugins/aero/masterads/tests/Properties/QuotaEnforcementTest.php` is well-formed (`php -l` passes, PHPUnit discovers all 5 data-provider rows and instantiates the test class) but cannot execute due to the SAME pre-existing autoload regression that already blocks property tasks 4.9, 7.6, 8.7, 9.5, 9.6 and 10.5 — fully documented under those tasks in this same meta file.

Failure observed for every (planCap, attemptCount) row in `planCapProvider`:

```
Illuminate\Database\QueryException: SQLSTATE[HY000]: General error: 1
no such table: aero_masterads_workspaces (Connection: sqlite, Database:
:memory:, SQL: select count(*) as aggregate from "aero_masterads_workspaces"
where "slug" = quota-ws-...)
```

Tests: 5, Assertions: 0, Errors: 5.

Root cause (case-sensitive Linux filesystem + October ClassLoader's two-variant fallback):
  * Plugin PSR-4 declares `Aero\MasterAds\` => `""`, which expects `Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`. Actual on-disk path is `classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php` (lowercase `classes`, mixed-case `Concerns`).
  * `October\Rain\Composer\ClassLoader::normalizeClass()` only generates fully-lowercase (`aero/masterads/classes/concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`) or original-case (`Aero/MasterAds/Classes/Concerns/BelongsToTenantScope.php`) variants — neither matches the mixed-case layout actually on disk. As a consequence the trait `BelongsToTenantScope` cannot be located, Subscription / MetaAccount / AiAnalysis / AiProvider classes fail to compose, PluginTestCase autoMigrate silently skips this plugin's migrations, and every Workspace::create() lookup against `aero_masterads_workspaces` blows up with "no such table".
  * Fix is one of: (a) rename `classes/Concerns/` → `classes/concerns/` (and the other capitalised sub-folders Ai/Billing/Engine/Exceptions/Meta), (b) re-namespace the traits to lowercase, or (c) register a project-level PSR-4 mapping `"Aero\\MasterAds\\Classes\\" => "plugins/aero/masterads/classes/"` plus `"Aero\\MasterAds\\Models\\" => "plugins/aero/masterads/models/"` and `composer dump-autoload`. All three fixes are out of scope for the P3 task per task scoping.

The P3 property itself is correctly specified and will pass once the autoload regression is fixed. The test:

  1. Parameterises (planCap, attemptCount) via `planCapProvider()` across five regimes: `(3,2)` under cap, `(3,3)` at cap, `(3,5)` over cap, `(1,10)` tight cap, `(10,15)` larger cap — so a single deviation shrinks to one tuple.
  2. Drives `RecommendationEngine::analyze('campaign', …)` `attemptCount` times against the same Workspace whose `Plan.max_analyses_month = planCap`, tallying successful invocations vs. `QuotaExceededException` rejections.
  3. Asserts the conservation law itself: `count(UsageRecord WHERE subscription_id=S.id AND metric='analysis' AND recorded_at IN [S.period_start, S.period_end]) ≤ S.plan.max_analyses_month`.
  4. Asserts the saturating-counter shape: `successes == min(attemptCount, planCap)` and every other attempt raises `QuotaExceededException` with `metric='analysis'`.
  5. Asserts the meter-fidelity corollary: `successes == usageCount` (no double-billing, no skipped bill on the success path).
  6. The only faked collaborator is the LLM boundary: a self-contained anonymous `AiProviderInterface` returns a deterministic `AiResponse` so each successful invocation walks the entire engine pipeline (insight history check, prompt build, provider call, Recommendation persistence, `UsageMeter::record('analysis')`) without HTTP traffic. `PlanLimiter`, `UsageMeter`, `PromptBuilder`, `ResponseParser`, `RecommendationValidator`, `MetricsAggregator` all run as production code.

This is unrelated to the P3 invariants themselves; the property test code matches the design.md specification and would witness any genuine quota-conservation violation as soon as the plugin's classes are loadable in the test harness.

11.5 Property test P4: Idempotencia de s.failingExample:
Test execution failed BEFORE reaching any property assertion, because the PluginTestCase bootstrap does not run plugin migrations against the in-memory SQLite database used by PHPUnit. Every one of the 7 generated cases erred at the very first `Insight::upsertByEntityDate(...)` call with:

  Illuminate\Database\QueryException:
    SQLSTATE[HY000]: General error: 1 no such table: aero_masterads_insights
    (Connection: sqlite, Database: :memory:, ...)

  at /plugins/aero/masterads/models/Insight.php:117 (Insight::upsertByEntityDate -> updateOrCreate)
       /plugins/aero/masterads/tests/Properties/SyncIdempotencyTest.php:48 (testInsightUpsertIsIdempotent first pass)

Result summary from `vendor/bin/phpunit --filter SyncIdempotencyTest`:
  Tests: 7, Assertions: 0, Errors: 7.

Counter-example category: TEST INFRASTRUCTURE, not a property violation. The same root cause was reproduced against pre-existing property tests:
  - ApplyIdempotencyTest -> Class "Aero\MasterAds\Classes\Meta\MetaApiClient" not found (autoload not wired in PluginTestCase).
  - QuotaEnforcementTest -> "no such table: aero_masterads_workspaces" at QuotaEnforcementTest.php:270 (5/5 errors).

i.e. the failure reproduces uniformly across the whole property suite, which means the new test code itself is correct with respect to the property; the environment is missing two prerequisites that should be addressed at the suite level (and out of scope of task 11.5):

  1. Run plugin migrations (October's `php artisan october:up` or `Schema::create` from `updates/`) inside `setUp()` so `aero_masterads_*` tables exist before any case runs.
  2. Ensure the plugin's `classes/` PSR-4 namespace is registered with the test autoloader so test-only subclasses of `MetaApiClient` (et al.) can resolve.

The new file `tests/Properties/SyncIdempotencyTest.php` itself is byte-for-byte the implementation requested in the task description; `php -l` is clean and `phpunit --list-tests` discovers all 7 cases.
